files.Title: Typhon.Engine.AccessControl
files.Summary: Synchronization type that allows multiple concurrent shared access or one exclusive. Doesn't allow re-entrant calls, burn CPU cycle on wait, using Costs 8 bytes of data.

files.Title: Typhon.Engine.AccessControlSmall
files.Summary: Synchronization type that allows multiple concurrent shared access or one exclusive. Doesn't allow re-entrant calls, burn CPU cycle on wait, using Costs 4 bytes of data.

files.Title: Typhon.Engine.BPTree.BTree<TKey>.NodeRelatives
files.Summary: contains information about relatives of each node, such as ancestors and siblings. this information is used for borrow and spill operations.

files.Title: Typhon.Engine.ChunkBasedSegment
files.Summary: Logical Segment that stores fixed sized chunk of data.

files.Title: Typhon.Engine.ChunkRandomAccessor
files.Summary: Allow access to chunks in a Chunk based segment

files.Title: Typhon.Engine.LogicalSegment
files.Summary: Expose a Logical segment of Pages

files.Title: Typhon.Engine.VariableSizedBufferSegment<T>
files.Summary: Segment to store variable size buffer of elements
